title: Dinant, Namur — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Dinant, Namur: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Dinant is a city in Namur with a population of 13,500. A dramatic cliffside town on the Meuse River, birthplace of Adolphe Sax, known for its Collegiate Church, citadel, and stunning natural scenery.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
